Variables.Name: RelativeTranslation
Variables.Description: Translation of the vector field relative to the emitter.

Variables.Description: Rotation of the vector field relative to the emitter.

Variables.Name: RelativeScale3D
Variables.Description: Scale of the vector field relative to the emitter.

Variables.Name: Intensity
Variables.Description: Intensity of the local vector field.

Variables.Description: Tile vector field in x axis?

Variables.Description: Tile vector field in z axis?

Variables.Description: Use fix delta time in the simulation?
